nodes.name: 灰頂火雀
nodes.summary: 灰頂火雀（學名：Lagonosticta rubricata）是梅花雀科火雀屬的一種鳥類，廣泛分佈於非洲。估計牠們的全球覆蓋達540萬平方公里。 參考 外部链接 BirdLife Species Factsheet （页面存档备份，存于互联网档案馆）
nodes.shortSummary: 灰頂火雀（學名：Lagonosticta rubricata）是梅花雀科火雀屬的一種鳥類，廣泛分佈於非洲。估計牠們的全球覆蓋達540萬平方公里。 參考 外部链接 BirdLife Species Factsheet （页面存档备份，存于互联网档案馆）

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The African firefinch (Lagonosticta rubricata), also called the blue-billed firefinch, is a common species of estrildid finch found in many parts of Africa

links.key: bird-灰頂火雀-386ce0b6__distributed_in__loc-欣里希-利希滕施泰因-04aece48
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The African firefinch (Lagonosticta rubricata), also called the blue-billed firefinch, is a common species of estrildid finch found in many parts of Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The African firefinch occurs in patches across sub-Saharan Africa, from Senegal east to Ethiopia then south to the southern Democratic Republic of Congo and Tanzania south through Mozambique to the Eastern Cape province of South Africa. It generally prefers humid, thickly vegetated habitats such as bracken Pteridium aquilinum at forest edges, savanna with acacia woodland, rank grass within and belowscrub or thornbush, along streams and rivers with thick vegetation, often near quiet paths or roads
